number.title: Say hello to your new number
number.description: We picked a local Twilio number based on where you're likely operating. You can keep it or choose a different one.
number.noSuggestionTitle: We couldn't confidently auto-pick a number yet.
number.noSuggestionDescription: Search by city, area code, or toll-free to choose the best number for your business.
number.loadFailed: We couldn't load a suggested number right now.
number.claimFailed: We couldn't provision that number. Please try again.
number.unavailable: That number was just taken. Pick another one from the refreshed list.
number.skipHint: You can always change this later from your Twilio number settings.
number.pickerDescription: Search local or toll-free numbers before you claim one.
